title: Assorted Foxes
body:
![spark_server](https://i.imgur.com/UV1gvFp.jpg)

![](https://i.imgur.com/8FzB5ZN.png)
***
Assorted Foxes is the perfect pack for your foxes, offering 25+ custom variants bringing new life to the Overworld! These foxes range from simple recolors to new animals offering some sneaky cameos.

![A group of Foxes!](https://i.imgur.com/gVuu4fx.png)

![Addon](https://imgur.com/oYpzoJf.png)
***
This pack requires the mentioned features marked below:

![Optifine or EMF/ETF](https://i.imgur.com/MS5KZjL.png)
 

![](https://i.imgur.com/AfRhw7z.png93483284/1086427548889657395/Features.png)
***
These mob variants can all be renamed to their appropriate skin and spawn naturally.

The pack is formatted in a way that allows for easy creation of add-ons!

![A group of Foxes!](https://i.imgur.com/2zTcvlj.png)

## ![](https://i.imgur.com/6mb4QDE.png)
***

[![Image](https://i.imgur.com/wbtkCOA.png)](https://discord.com/invite/kYYmAWQ)
